src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/e.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions.
Introduce Lombok annotations to replace boilerplate getters, setters, and constructors, simplifying the entity class structure.
Add Jackson annotations to prevent serialization issues with Hibernate lazy loading proxies and circular references.
Change the artist field from a simple String to a ManyToOne relationship with an Artist entity to normalize the database schema.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/e.human_impl: @ManyToOne(fetch = FetchType.LAZY, optional = false) private Artist artist;

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/e.general_idea: Add a OneToMany relationship to manage tracks associated with the album, including cascade and orphan removal settings.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/e.human_impl: @OneToMany(mappedBy = "album", fetch = FetchType.LAZY, cascade = CascadeType.ALL, orphanRemoval = true) private List<Track> tracks = new ArrayList<>();

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/e.general_idea: Add a ManyToMany relationship to manage genres associated with the album via a join table.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/e.human_impl: @ManyToMany(fetch = FetchType.LAZY) @JoinTable(...) private Set<Genre> genres = new HashSet<>();

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/e.general_idea: Implement helper methods to maintain bidirectional consistency for tracks and genres relationships.

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/m.general_idea: Rename AlbumDto to AlbumDTO to follow standard Java naming conventions for Data Transfer Objects.
Remove @Component annotation as the class is refactored to a static utility class, decoupling it from the Spring context.
Make the class final with a private constructor to prevent instantiation, enforcing its use as a static utility class.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/m.human_impl: public final class AlbumMapper { private AlbumMapper() { } ... }

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/m.general_idea: Change the mapping method to static to align with the utility class pattern and remove dependency on instance state.
Update the DTO construction to include new fields such as genre IDs and nested track DTOs, reflecting changes in the domain model.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/m.human_impl: return new AlbumDTO(a.getId(), a.getTitle(), a.getYear(), a.getArtist().getId(), genreIds, a.getTracks().stream().map(TrackMapper::toDto).toList())

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/m.general_idea: Replace Collectors.toList() with the Stream.toList() method introduced in Java 16 for cleaner code.

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/r.general_idea: Replace the custom in-memory repository implementation with a Spring Data JPA interface to enable database persistence.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/r.human_impl: Changed class AlbumRepository to interface AlbumRepository extends JpaRepository<Album, Long>

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/r.general_idea: Define explicit entity graphs to eagerly fetch associated entities (artist, tracks, genres) to avoid N+1 query problems.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/r.human_impl: Added @EntityGraph(attributePaths = {"artist", "tracks", "genres"}) to findWithAllById and findAllByIdIn methods

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/r.general_idea: Add a specific query method to retrieve an album with all its associations by ID.
Add a specific query method to retrieve multiple albums with all their associations by a list of IDs.

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.general_idea: Rename AlbumDto to AlbumDTO to follow standard Java naming conventions for Data Transfer Objects.
Add TrackDTO import to support track data transfer in album operations.
Add Album entity import to work with domain model directly.
Add Artist entity import to manage artist relationships.
Add Genre entity import to manage genre relationships.
Add Track entity import to manage track relationships.
Add ErrorMessages import for standardized error handling.
Add NotFoundException import for explicit exception throwing.
Add ArtistRepository import to fetch artist data.
Add GenreRepository import to fetch genre data.
Add Transactional annotation import for transaction management.
Add Set import to handle genre ID collections.
Update constructor to inject Artist and Genre repositories and rename fields for clarity.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.human_impl: public AlbumService(AlbumRepository albumRepository, ArtistRepository artistRepository, GenreRepository genreRepository)

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.general_idea: Replace findAll with getAll, add readOnly transaction, and use static mapper method.
Replace findById with getById, add readOnly transaction, and throw exception if not found.

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.general_idea: Add create method to persist new albums with associated artists, genres, and tracks.
Add update method to modify existing albums and their relationships.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.human_impl: @Transactional public AlbumDTO update(Long id, AlbumDTO dto) { ... }

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.general_idea: Add delete method to remove albums by ID.
Add helper method applyGenres to associate genres with an album.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.human_impl: private void applyGenres(Album album, Set<Long> genreIds) { ... }

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.general_idea: Add helper method applyTracks to associate tracks with an album.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.human_impl: private void applyTracks(Album album, List<TrackDTO> trackDtos) { ... }

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.general_idea: Remove legacy findByTitle method as it is no longer needed.
Remove legacy findById method replaced by getById.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 4.0.2 to 3.3.4 to align with Java 21 ecosystem and modern Spring features.
Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Add maven.compiler.release property to ensure bytecode compatibility with Java 21.
Rename the artifact ID from 'music-catalog' to 'musiccatalog' for consistency.
Update project name and description to be more descriptive and properly capitalized.
Remove explicit Tomcat version override, relying on Spring Boot's managed version.
Add Spring Data JPA starter for database persistence support.
Add Spring Boot starter validation for bean validation support.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver for database connectivity.
Add Flyway core for database migration management.
Add Flyway PostgreSQL extension for PostgreSQL-specific migration support.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in Java classes.
Remove explicit AssertJ exclusion and version override, relying on Spring Boot's managed version.
pom.xml.human_impl: <!-- Removed assertj-core exclusion and explicit version -->

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler plugin with release version and Lombok annotation processor path.
Add Flyway Maven plugin for database migration execution.

config/checkstyle/checkstyle.xml.general_idea: Replace a minimal custom Checkstyle configuration with the comprehensive Google Java Style configuration to enforce stricter and more modern coding standards.
config/checkstyle/checkstyle.xml.human_impl: Replaced simple modules (Indentation, CustomImportOrder) with a full suite of Google-style modules including TypeName, MemberName, and various whitespace checks.

config/checkstyle/checkstyle.xml.general_idea: Add Checkstyle modules that specifically validate Java Records, a feature introduced in Java 16, ensuring the linter supports modern Java syntax.
config/checkstyle/checkstyle.xml.human_impl: Added modules like RecordComponentName, RecordTypeParameterName, and RECORD_DEF tokens to LeftCurly/RightCurly checks.

config/checkstyle/checkstyle.xml.general_idea: Update Checkstyle configuration to support Java 14+ switch expressions and rules, including yield statements.
config/checkstyle/checkstyle.xml.human_impl: Added LITERAL_YIELD and LITERAL_SWITCH tokens to WhitespaceAfter and RightCurly checks.

config/checkstyle/checkstyle.xml.general_idea: Include checks for pattern variables introduced in Java 16+ to ensure naming conventions apply to modern pattern matching syntax.
config/checkstyle/checkstyle.xml.human_impl: Added PatternVariableName module with specific regex formatting.

config/checkstyle/checkstyle.xml.general_idea: Enforce coding standards for lambda expressions, which are prevalent in modern Java development.
config/checkstyle/checkstyle.xml.human_impl: Added LambdaParameterName, allowEmptyLambdas in WhitespaceAround, and LAMBDA tokens to various whitespace checks.

config/checkstyle/checkstyle.xml.general_idea: Configure Checkstyle to handle Java 15+ text blocks and string literals correctly.
config/checkstyle/checkstyle.xml.human_impl: Added IllegalTokenText and AvoidEscapedUnicodeCharacters modules to manage escape sequences in strings.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Migrate application configuration from Java Properties format to YAML format.
Update the server listening port from 8080 to 8087.
